race.comment: STEELY GIRL (3) came out quickly from the wide draw and the early effort told in the straight with a tiring seventh over 1400m at Taree. Unbeaten in two starts on her home track and maps to get the gun run. Set to bounce back. MOSGIEL DAISY (4) made up good ground late at her first run back with a tidy fifth over 1250m at Taree. Proven at the trip and looks to have come back even stronger. Leading prospect. HEADSTREAM (13) ploughed through the heavy conditions first-up with a convincing Maiden win over 1412m at Coffs Harbour. Gets the good run from the draw and not to be overlooked. TALANA (1) up in trip and grade when never comfortable in the heavy conditions with a dismal last over 1612m at Coffs Harbour. Suited at this level with the 3kg claim. Don't underestimate.
